name: Road To Champion: Boxing Simulator
short_description: "Road To Champion: Boxing Simulator" is an exciting simulation of the boxing world. Shape your career, decorate your home, customize your car, and fight your way to becoming a champion!
detailed_description:
Experience the thrill of boxing like never before with "Road To Champion: Boxing Simulator". Step into the shoes of a rising boxing star and immerse yourself in the adrenaline-pumping world of professional boxing. But it's not just about the fights; it's about the journey you take both inside and outside the ring.



Train relentlessly to hone your skills and rise through the ranks of the boxing world. Each victory brings you closer to your ultimate goal of becoming a champion. But the road to glory isn't just about what happens in the ring - it's about the decisions you make outside of it.



Manage every aspect of your boxer's life, from their training regimen to their social interactions. Use your earnings from matches to customize your home, upgrade your car, or invest in businesses. Build relationships with fans, sponsors, and even potential love interests through the in-game phone application.



Experience the highs and lows of life as a professional athlete as you navigate the complexities of fame, fortune, and competition. Will you succumb to the temptations of excess, or will you stay true to your roots and inspire others with your journey?

**Road To Champion: Boxing Simulator offers a unique blend of sports simulation and life management, giving players the opportunity to create their own legacy in and out of the ring. Are you ready to step into the spotlight and become the undisputed champion?

supported_languages:
English*, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese
*languages with full audio support
